mapper.select: SELECT id, settlement_no, merchant_id, period_start, period_end, total_amount, service_fee, settle_amount, order_count, refund_amount, status, settle_time, bank_name, bank_account, remark, create_time, update_time FROM settlement_record WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(settle_amount), 0) FROM settlement_record WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND status = 0
